arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) identifying the DHCP options set.

dhcp_options_id.description: The unique ID assigned to the DHCP options set.

domain_name.description: The domain name configured in the DHCP options.

domain_name_servers.description: A list of domain name servers specified in the DHCP options.

id.description: The unique identifier for this set of DHCP options.

ipv6_address_preferred_lease_time.description: The preferred lease time for IPv6 addresses in the DHCP options.

netbios_name_servers.description: A list of NetBIOS name servers configured in the DHCP options.

netbios_node_type.description: The NetBIOS node type specified in the DHCP options.

ntp_servers.description: A list of Network Time Protocol (NTP) servers specified in the DHCP options.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the DHCP options set.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the DHCP options set.
